'''vabulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qila|qila]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qila|qila]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vabulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væbilith|væbilith]] || [[word:væbilij|væbilij]] || [[word:væbilish|væbilish]] || [[word:væbili|væbili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vabubuluth|vabubuluth]] || [[word:vabubuluj|vabubuluj]] || [[word:vabubulush|vabubulush]] || [[word:vabubulu|vabubulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vabuluth|vabuluth]] || [[word:vabuluj|vabuluj]] || [[word:vabulush|vabulush]] || [[word:vabulu|vabulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vabufluth|vabufluth]] || [[word:vabufluj|vabufluj]] || [[word:vabuflush|vabuflush]] || [[word:vabufluf|vabufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vabuluthu|vabuluthu]] || [[word:vabuluju|vabuluju]] || [[word:vabulushu|vabulushu]] || [[word:vabuluku|vabuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vabuluth|vabuluth]] || [[word:vabuluj|vabuluj]] || [[word:vabulush|vabulush]] || [[word:vabulu|vabulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vabuluthul|vabuluthul]] || [[word:vabulujul|vabulujul]] || [[word:vabulushul|vabulushul]] || [[word:vabulukul|vabulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vabuluthuthu|vabuluthuthu]] || [[word:vabulujuju|vabulujuju]] || [[word:vabulushushu|vabulushushu]] || [[word:vabuluku|vabuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vabuluthun|vabuluthun]] || [[word:vabulujun|vabulujun]] || [[word:vabulushun|vabulushun]] || [[word:vabulukun|vabulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vabuluthuoro|vabuluthuoro]] || [[word:vabulujuoro|vabulujuoro]] || [[word:vabulushuoro|vabulushuoro]] || [[word:vabulukuoro|vabulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
